description: For more info on the protoflux tool in general, see ProtoFlux and ProtoFlux Tool.

fields.SpawnNodeType: The type of the ProtoFlux node to spawn.
fields.WirePoint: The slot that the tool is currently pulling a wire out of.
fields.MaxConnectDistance: The distance this protoflux tool will search for nodes from it's tip before stopping. it's usually 20 meters in local space.
fields.SelectionProgress: How far the user is to selecting nodes by holding Secondary
fields.HoveringElementName: The name of the protoflux element this tool is currently hovering over
fields.HoveringElementContentType: The type of the protoflux element this tool is currently hovering over
fields._selectedNodes: The list of nodes the protoflux nodes that the tool currently has selected.
fields._wirePointPosition: What field to drive on a StripeMesh for a currently pulled wire.
fields._text: The text to drive with information from this tool.
fields._currentProxy: What element the protoflux tool is currently pulling in order to connect to another element via the UI.
fields._currentTempWire: The current wire that this tool is pulling from a protoflux connector.
fields._currentCutLine: The current wire that this tool is trying to cut.
fields._cutLineScale: The current wire that this tool is trying to cut's scale.
fields._cutLineOrientation: The orientation of the current wire that this tool is trying to cut.
fields._currentHighlightedNode: The current node this tool is looking at.

methods.ToggleOverviewMode: Called when the toggle overview mode button is touched.
methods.OnPackInPlace: Called when the pack in place button is touched.
methods.OnUnpack: Called when the unpack button is touched.
methods.OnClearSelection: Called when the clear selection button is touched.
methods.OpenNodeBrowser: Called when the open node browser button is touched.
methods.OnCreateDrive: Called when the create drive button is touched.
methods.OnCreateWrite: Called when the create write button is touched.
methods.OnCreateLocal: Called when the create local button is touched.
methods.OnCreateStore: Called when the create store button is touched.
methods.OnCreateDataModelStore: Called when the create data model store button is touched.
methods.OnCreateSource: Called when the create source button is touched.
methods.OnCreateReference: Called when the create reference button is touched.
methods.OnCreateDelegateProxy: Called when the create delegate proxy button is touched.
